nodes.label: Read a small clipped DEM through GDAL XYZ output as a row-major 2D array.

nodes.label: 3D Tiles Materialized View Contract
nodes.rationale: pg2b3dm needs a flat geometry/properties view, so export is mediated by a stable materialized view contract.

nodes.label: Vertical Datum and EPSG:32650
nodes.rationale: Terrain z values are treated as elevations in the projected horizontal CRS context, but the vertical datum must be tracked explicitly for UAV clearance.

nodes.label: Grid Level Auto Selection
nodes.rationale: Visible grid density is chosen from screen pixels so the viewer remains readable and performant.
